channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Elon Musk is pushing to build data centers in space. But they won’t solve AI’s power problems anytime soon
item.description: Proponents say orbital data centers could solve AI’s power and cooling crunch. Experts say that vision is far more distant than the hype suggests.

item.title: The Prognosis For Longitudinal Mental Health Relationships Between Humans And AI
item.description: AI such as ChatGPT is giving mental health advise to users. What impact will this have over the long term? Will society be better off or worse off, sa...

item.title: Despite a $400 million net worth and Hollywood career, Reese Witherspoon tells young people to stop chasing their dreams—and do this instead
item.description: Reese Witherspoon is telling young people to stop romanticizing the “dream job” and start getting brutally honest about what they’re actually good at.

item.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says AI spending still makes sense despite bubble fears
item.description: The Google CEO touched down in New Delhi this week with a string of new India investments in tow.

item.title: New Details Confirm Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra’s Powerful Upgrade
item.description: New Geekbench scores for the Galaxy S26 Ultra reveal the power of Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5. See how it stacks up before the Feb 23 Galaxy Unpacked eve...

item.title: Kevin Hassett says Fed economists should be 'disciplined' over tariff study
item.description: White House economic advisor Kevin Hassett called for the New York Fed to discipline economists over research showing U.S. businesses and consumers be...

item.title: Bill Gates pulls out of India’s AI summit at the last minute in the latest blow to an event dogged by organizational chaos
item.description: The Microsoft founder's abrupt withdrawal, amid renewed scrutiny over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, capped a chaotic few days for an event already dogg...

item.title: ‘NYT Mini’ Clues And Answers For Thursday, February 19
item.description: Looking for help with today's NYT Mini Crossword puzzle? Here are some hints and answers for the puzzle.

item.title: Who is OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger? The millennial developer caught the attention of Sam Altman and Mark Zuckerberg
item.description: Steinberger made $100M off his first company and quit coding. Now he’s back to show the world the “magic” of agentic AI.

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1706 Hints And Answer For Thursday, February 19
item.description: Looking for help with today's New York Times Wordle? Here are some expert hints, clues and commentary to help you solve today's Wordle and sharpen you...

item.title: Meta Smartwatch Makes Perfect Sense Amid Smart Glasses Strategy
item.description: A Meta smartwatch is planned, having previously been shelved several years ago. But it makes sense amid a shift away from VR, and towards smart glasse...

item.title: You can invest in SpaceX before its IPO — but should you?
8 ways you may be squandering money in retirement
Federal judge rules on whether Buffalo Wild Wings can keep 'boneless wings' on menu
item.description: Federal judge dismisses Buffalo Wild Wings "boneless wings" lawsuit with pun-filled ruling, saying no reasonable consumer expects deboned wing meat.

item.title: Fed dissent grows as some officials weigh return to interest rate hikes amid stubborn inflation
item.description: The minutes of the Federal Reserve's January meeting revealed policymakers considered language about possible rate hikes amid concerns over elevated i...

item.title: Tesla dodges California license suspension after dropping misleading 'autopilot' marketing terms
item.description: Tesla avoids California license suspension after stopping "autopilot" use in marketing following state DMV order over misleading advertising practices...

item.title: Rent becoming more affordable for many Americans as market stabilizes
item.description: A housing market shift is giving renters more bargaining power as vacancy rates rise and median households spend 24.3% of income on rent, down from pa...

item.title: U.S. stocks are trailing the world. It could be the beginning of an epic shift.
What oil hitting $70 a barrel would signal about U.S.-Iran tensions
‘Magnificent Seven’ stocks rise — but hardly enough to reverse a brutal February
Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
